tools.name: getObjectModelSummary
tools.description: Get schema information about the object model including classes, attributes, primary keys, and relationships.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Query business objects of a specific type with optional filtering and sorting.

tools.name: getObjectById
tools.description: Retrieve a specific business object by its primary key.

tools.name: getAggregate
tools.description: Calculate aggregate values (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX) across business objects.

tools.name: access
tools.description: Retrieve objects referenced by a specific attribute of a referencing business object.

tools.name: insert
tools.description: Save one or more business objects to the database.

tools.name: update
tools.description: Update one or more existing business objects.

tools.name: update2
tools.description: Bulk update business objects matching a filter condition.

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete specific business objects from the database.

tools.name: delete2
tools.description: Bulk delete business objects matching a filter condition.
